codeReview.summary: Feature behavior is largely complete for /categories and /categories/:slug (including nested slugs), with solid API/client test coverage. I found one non-blocking edge-case issue in breadcrumb visibility handling.

issues.description: Breadcrumb parent lookup does not filter on cat_display='yes' (it queries only by catId), so a visible child category can expose hidden ancestor categories in public breadcrumbs. This is an edge-case data-leak of hidden taxonomy and can conflict with hidden-category display expectations.

sharedStateObservations.observation: A useful Hono routing caveat is missing from shared library docs: wildcard `*` param extraction in sub-routers can be unreliable for this use case, and `/:uri{.+}` is the robust pattern for nested slugs.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skill feedback explicitly requests this addition (`.../handoffs/2026-03-19T18-47-38-523Z__category-browse-pages__3fb03cab-03a4-49d8-8b0a-5cfe6dc41c9d.json` -> `handoff.skillFeedback.suggestedChanges[0]`); implementation uses `router.get('/:uri{.+}', ...)` in `app/apps/server/src/routes/public.ts:126`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `fullstack-worker` procedure's strict 'write API tests first (red)' step did not match the actual execution flow for this feature, where route implementation/debugging preceded test additions due framework routing behavior discovery.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for worker session `3fb03cab-03a4-49d8-8b0a-5cfe6dc41c9d` shows edits to `public.ts` before edits to `public.test.ts`; skill file `/.factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md` mandates tests-first as step 4.

summary: Pass. Category browse feature is implemented and validated with strong coverage; one non-blocking breadcrumb visibility edge case and two shared-state documentation/procedure observations were recorded.
